menu.title: DARKLINE — First Island Chain
brief.title: Briefing
brief.body:
1953, Taipei. The ink on the ceasefire is barely dry, and behind every lamp in this city someone is listening.
You are Lin Chien-kuo — a logistics consultant at Western Rim Trading, the kind of small courier nobody looks at twice. You run dead drops, copy down cables, and enter names, one by one, into a ledger no one is ever meant to see: the darkline roster.
brief.body2:
These past days the names on it keep going dark. The brass says the North is hunting them, and wants you to find the leak.
When Nie — your handler, your teacher — hands you the job, he says only this: 'Watch the names. And trust no paper in anyone's hand.'
brief.body3:
As he leaves, Nie smooths your collar and lowers his voice: 'When your father gave you that name, the country he meant wasn't the one hanging on the wall.'
He pats your shoulder. 'Don't let them hear it. Stay alive first — the rest comes after.'
decode.title: Decode Cable
decode.needkey: No cipher key — find what the contact left in the alley first.
decode.clue: The cable opens up: the handoff is at Pier 3, the midnight watch — and the North has put a price on every name. The last line isn't about tonight: "If the line is cut, reconnect along the old net, await no order." The old net… some lines are buried precisely to wake decades later.
scrap.title: Nie's Note
scrap.body:
Behind the loose brick in the corner, a half-sheet of paper — left by Nie before they took him. One scrawled line: cipher {c} is plain {p}.
He wants you to crack the cable. He knew: the roster is still in our own hands.
card.dropoff.title: They Took Nie
card.dropoff.body:
When the shooting stops, the alley is already empty. No Northern agents — just two men in suits, a warrant held up 'by law,' and Nie marched into a car.
He looks back once. He doesn't call out. The headlights die at the alley mouth.
For the first time you understand: tonight's real enemy is not where your gun is pointed.
card.embark.title: To the Docks
card.embark.body: The packet is in hand, the wax still warm. A ship's horn draws out, far off — she's about to sail. Follow that band of light at the alley's end and move; the docks will tell the truth.
free.exit: Head for the docks (reach the end of the alley)
ending.title: Mission Complete
ending.body: The roster is back where it belongs. The defector went down into the harbor, tattoo and all. Tonight, not a single name fell into Northern hands.
ending.body2: But every name is a darkline, and every line gets pulled again in time. When the First Island Chain draws tight once more — we will meet again.
over.title: Mission Failed
over.body: The line is cut. The roster is in Northern hands.
over.retry: (Press R to retry from the last checkpoint)
